# Documentation
Autogenerated documentation for this package can be found at

[https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-pango-1.0.30/docs/GI-Pango.html](https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-pango-1.0.30/docs/GI-Pango.html)
